text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hours and hours of rain stretching well into the afternoon, the
clouds finally clear away, signaling the start of the scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this place is packed with people! I'm not surprised
though—Grass Wonder's going to be racing today!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
The track doesn't look too good after all that rain... but I'm sure this is
nothing for Grass.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hello, King! Let's have a good race today.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you the honor of facing me, Grass! I'll show you what a
first-rate running style looks like!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: …So, you're here again.
choice_data_list: Yeah, I came to see you participate.
Yeah, I came to see you participate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmm... You're more stubborn than I expected.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...I don't mind though. If that's how badly you want to watch me run,
then I'll give you a show! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Looks like King's doing just fine.
choice_data_list: Did you come here to support King too?
Did you come here to support King too?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nyahaha, nah. I didn't have much to do today, so I'm just here to kill
some time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, looks like the race is starting. You better pay close
attention. If she finds out you weren't properly looking, she'll get all
upset.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Clear the way! I'm coming through!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, King Halo's charging to the front! Maybe she's good at races
that require power, just like her mother?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Who knows. It's too early to say for sure yet. Let's keep watching.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I will... prove that... I'm first-rate!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, this is new from King. I guess she doesn't wanna get stuck
again in the middle of the pack like at the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But her body's stiffening up under all that energy she's putting in.
This always happens to her whenever she gets too pent up about
something.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ah, what a shame. If only she learned to relax and run more freely...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: It's the final stretch! Look, Grass Wonder's coming!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She's a force to be reckoned with! I don't see a hint of weakness in
her gait! The gap between her and King is rapidly increasing!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Looks like Grass ended up being the star of today's show.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the race comes to an end.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: I always knew Grass Wonder would win.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't look like she's accepting any scouting offers right now, but
I'd love to have a chat with her at the next tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Me too! As for King Halo... well, I'm sure she got a reality check after
seeing today's results.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Next time will be different! Get ready everyone, because
you all haven't even seen my best yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other trainers turn to her with a look of exasperation on their
faces as she flaunts her usual demeanor.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's right, pay careful attention! Remember my words—I am King
Halo, the first-rate racer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of the defeats, disappointments, or ridicule, her endless
commitment pushes her to the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If commitment is what she wants to see, then there's only one thing
for me to do!
choice_data_list: And I am a first-rate trainer!
And I am a first-rate trainer!

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: That's why I want to scout a first-rate racer!
That's why I want to scout a first-rate racer!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Umm... are you okay? Did you mistake her for Grass Wonder?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: You do realize the person in front of you is King Halo, right?
choice_data_list:
That's right! I'm here for King Halo and no one
else!

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text: Murmur...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure you have what it takes to push the boundaries of my
overwhelming talent?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure you're ready to become an unstoppable force and
spread my name around the world?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Very well.
Everyone here—listen up!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
From this day forward, I, the first-rate King Halo, will join hands with
this first-rate trainer!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Get ready because we're going to take the Twinkle Series by storm
and win every race! Better grab a pair of sunglasses so you don't get
blinded by our glory!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Come, Trainer. We have documents to sign!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Honestly, why on earth did you do that?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Do you truly understand what calling yourself "first-rate" in front of
everyone is going to do?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
People are going to laugh at you and make fun of you behind your
back. The world will crush your shoulders. But you can't take those
words back.
choice_data_list:
Then I've got no choice but to truly become
first-rate.

Then I've got no choice but to truly become
first-rate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Heh, what a dummy. You're more stubborn and clumsy than I could've
ever imagined!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...But I guess it's not a bad thing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzz... Bzzz...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's Mother again...
choice_data_list: We should make a statement together.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh? A statement?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Now that's what I like to hear!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm going to answer now. Are you ready? On three! One,
two...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my pursuit of first-rate greatness with King Halo officially
begins.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Mother? I have an announcement to make. No, I'm not going
home. In fact, let me introduce my new trainer to you!
